_readme: Confirmed against real saved MEG (audits.megsupporttools.com) pages: the dashboard list page, a Closed record page, and an open Analysis/Investigation record page (2026-07-04). type 'id' = Selenium By.ID (most reliable, used wherever possible). type 'css'/'xpath' still supported.

record_rows._status: CONFIRMED - table has no id, but this class combo is unique on the dashboard page

event_description_cell._status: CONFIRMED - column 6 = 'Please select the safety event description', used for early code-filtering before opening a record

harm_level_cell._status: CONFIRMED - column 7 = 'Please confirm the level of harm'

status_cell._status: CONFIRMED - column 10 = 'Status' (Closed, Management approval, Analysis / Investigation)

open_record_link._status: CONFIRMED (pencil/edit icon) - not used by default since the app navigates by direct URL, kept as a fallback

safety_event_description_field._status: CONFIRMED - a bootstrap-multiselect-wrapped <select>; the app only reads this, never sets it

free_text_description_field._status: CONFIRMED - read-only <span data-value=...> even on open records; only read, never filled

harm_level_field._status: CONFIRMED (record page copy of the same value shown in harm_level_cell)

analysis_tool_field._status: CONFIRMED - stays a hidden span even on an open Analysis/Investigation record, so set_analysis_tool() is a safe no-op and isn't actually required

define_problem_field._status: CONFIRMED - real <textarea> on the open record

safety_event_owner_field._status: CONFIRMED - Select2 remote-search widget (not a plain select); see browser_controller.ensure_safety_event_owner()

save_button._status: UPDATED from DevTools screenshot -- button lives in a sticky toolbar (toolbar.sticky > div.group-left > div.audit-report-controls), NOT inside #observation-form as previously assumed. This is likely the actual cause of the repeated save-button failures.

why6_field._status: UNCONFIRMED - extrapolated from the confirmed why1-5 naming pattern and the root-cause radio groups which do go up to _10; please confirm if you ever need more than 5 causes

why7_field._status: UNCONFIRMED - extrapolated from the confirmed why1-5 naming pattern and the root-cause radio groups which do go up to _10; please confirm if you ever need more than 5 causes

why8_field._status: UNCONFIRMED - extrapolated from the confirmed why1-5 naming pattern and the root-cause radio groups which do go up to _10; please confirm if you ever need more than 5 causes

why9_field._status: UNCONFIRMED - extrapolated from the confirmed why1-5 naming pattern and the root-cause radio groups which do go up to _10; please confirm if you ever need more than 5 causes

why10_field._status: UNCONFIRMED - extrapolated from the confirmed why1-5 naming pattern and the root-cause radio groups which do go up to _10; please confirm if you ever need more than 5 causes
